title: PRIMARY CARE - 211info
text: A BALANCED LIFE HEALTH CARE PRIMARY CARE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides comprehensive health care services, utilizing both conventional and alternative care practices. Services include annual exams, screening and treatment for acute and chronic illnesses and diseases, and nutrition and lifestyle education. 2005 SE Hawthorne Boulevard Portland, OR 97214 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Email (503) 236-4580 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main (503) 236-4580 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information and to make an appointment FEES: Accepts OHP and some private insurance, discounts available for at time of service payments DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable, state ID card AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Close to the TriMet bus line 14 stop and within walking distance of the bus stop for line 15 Services: Alternative Medicine General Medical Care General Physical Examinations Pap Tests Private Clinics Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SCREENING/DIAGNOSTIC SERVICES - SCREENWISE-ENROLLING HUMAN REPRODUCTION - OREGON CONTRACEPTIVE CARE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. A BALANCED LIFE HEALTH CARE
